title: tui: nested MlsClient::new().unwrap() panics on repeated MLS init failure
description: tui/src/event.rs:108-113: on reconnect, MlsClient is reset with `MlsClient::new().unwrap_or_else(|e| { ...; MlsClient::new().unwrap() })`. If both attempts fail (e.g. OpenMLS in-memory storage corrupted), the second `.unwrap()` panics. The comment says the error is recoverable but then panics, crashing the TUI. Fix: replace the inner `.unwrap()` with a warn log and return the stale client (already correct comment intent): `tracing::warn!("MLS client reset failed twice: {e2}; keeping stale client"); old_client`.
